SageTVPlugin.Name: PWA MiniClient
SageTVPlugin.Description: HTML5/PWA MiniClient for SageTV. Access your SageTV server from any modern browser — iPad, PC, Android, and more. Includes a Node.js WebSocket bridge that relays the SageTV MiniClient binary protocol over WebSockets, and a fully client-side PWA with Canvas 2D rendering, encryption, compression, media playback, and touch/gamepad input.
SageTVPlugin.Author: galeforcesage
SageTVPlugin.ReleaseNotes: 1.0.0 - Initial release - Full SageTV MiniClient protocol support (handshake, properties, GFX commands) - RSA key exchange + Blowfish encryption - ZLIB streaming decompression - Canvas 2D rendering with surface compositing and transforms - Font streaming and text rendering - Keyboard, mouse, touch, and gamepad input - HTML5 media playback via MSE with ffmpeg transcoding - Multi-server management with per-server bridge URL - PWA installable with service worker - 28+ configurable settings matching Android MiniClient
